rationale: A is closer to the asked anchor set: 4.2.0 Connect docs, the concrete `SimpleHeaderConverter` implementation, and a plausible neighboring test. B over-centers the interface/config wiring and a test helper (`SampleHeaderConverter`) instead of the production converter and direct regression tests, so it is less useful for changing Java code.

A: May overstate the existence/location of `SimpleHeaderConverterTest` without confirming the exact 4.2.0 tree.
Does not name the versioned doc path explicitly, only the general Javadocs/source anchors.
B: Misses the concrete production implementation class `SimpleHeaderConverter` as the main behavior anchor.
Uses `SampleHeaderConverter` as a test anchor, which is a helper pattern rather than the direct header-conversion regression suite.
Focuses on `HeaderConverter` interface and plugin-version wiring more than header conversion behavior itself.
